tEn: Matching Networks for One Shot Learning
tZh: 匹配网络用于单样本学习
sEn: A novel framework combining metric learning with external memories achieves state-of-the-art one-shot learning on vision and language tasks.
sZh: 一种结合度量学习与外部记忆的新框架在视觉和语言任务上实现了最先进的单样本学习性能。
absEn: Learning from a few examples remains a key challenge in machine learning. Despite recent advances in important domains such as vision and language, the standard supervised deep learning paradigm does not offer a satisfactory solution for learning new concepts rapidly from little data. In this work, we employ ideas from metric learning based on deep neural features and from recent advances that augment neural networks with external memories. Our framework learns a network that maps a small labelled support set and an unlabelled example to its label, obviating the need for fine-tuning to adapt to new class types. We then define one-shot learning problems on vision (using Omniglot, ImageNet) and language tasks. Our algorithm improves one-shot accuracy on ImageNet from 87.6% to 93.2% and from 88.0% to 93.8% on Omniglot compared to competing approaches. We also demonstrate the usefulness of the same model on language modeling by introducing a one-shot task on the Penn Treebank.
absZh: 从少量样本中学习仍然是机器学习的一个关键挑战。尽管在视觉和语言等重要领域取得了最新进展，标准的监督深度学习范式并不能为从少量数据中快速学习新概念提供令人满意的解决方案。在这项工作中，我们采用了基于深度神经特征的度量学习思想，以及最近通过外部记忆增强神经网络的进展。我们的框架学习一个网络，该网络将一个小型标注支持集和一个未标注示例映射到其标签，从而无需微调即可适应新的类别类型。然后，我们在视觉（使用Omniglot、ImageNet）和语言任务上定义了单样本学习问题。与竞争方法相比，我们的算法在ImageNet上将单样本准确率从87.6%提高到93.2%，在Omniglot上从88.0%提高到93.8%。我们还通过在Penn Treebank上引入一个单样本任务，展示了同一模型在语言建模中的实用性。

contrib.en: Proposes Matching Networks, a neural architecture combining metric learning with external memory for one-shot learning.
contrib.zh: 提出匹配网络，一种结合度量学习与外部记忆的神经架构，用于单样本学习。

contrib.en: Introduces a training procedure that matches test conditions by sampling episodes from label sets, enabling meta-learning.
contrib.zh: 引入一种训练流程，通过从标签集采样情节来匹配测试条件，实现元学习。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art one-shot accuracy on Omniglot (93.8%) and ImageNet (93.2%), outperforming baselines.
contrib.zh: 在Omniglot（93.8%）和ImageNet（93.2%）上达到最先进的单样本准确率，超越基线。

contrib.en: Defines new one-shot benchmarks on ImageNet, miniImageNet, and a language modeling task on Penn Treebank.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet、miniImageNet和Penn Treebank的语言建模任务上定义了新的单样本基准。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that non-parametric attention mechanisms allow rapid adaptation to new classes without fine-tuning.
contrib.zh: 证明非参数注意力机制允许快速适应新类别而无需微调。

contrib.en: Shows that Full Contextual Embeddings (FCE) improve performance by encoding support set context.
contrib.zh: 展示全上下文嵌入（FCE）通过编码支持集上下文来提升性能。

limits.en: Computational cost grows linearly with support set size, limiting scalability to large sets.
limits.zh: 计算成本随支持集大小线性增长，限制了大规模集的扩展性。

limits.en: Performance degrades on fine-grained classification tasks like ImageNet dogs subset due to label bias.
limits.zh: 在细粒度分类任务（如ImageNet狗子集）上性能下降，归因于标签偏差。

limits.en: Model assumes support set classes are disjoint from training classes; fails if distributions diverge.
limits.zh: 模型假设支持集类别与训练类别不相交；若分布偏离则失效。

limits.en: Language modeling results (32-38% accuracy) are far below oracle LSTM, indicating limited one-shot capability in NLP.
limits.zh: 语言建模结果（32-38%准确率）远低于Oracle LSTM，表明NLP中单样本能力有限。

limits.en: Requires careful episode sampling during training to match test distribution, limiting generalization.
limits.zh: 训练时需要仔细的情节采样以匹配测试分布，限制了泛化能力。

items.en: Learning from a few examples remains a key challenge in machine learning. Despite recent advances in important domains such as vision and language, the standard supervised deep learning paradigm does not offer a satisfactory solution for learning new concepts rapidly from little data. In this work, we employ ideas from metric learning based on deep neural features and from recent advances that augment neural networks with external memories. Our framework learns a network that maps a small labelled support set and an unlabelled example to its label, obviating the need for fine-tuning to adapt to new class types. We then define one-shot learning problems on vision (using Omniglot, ImageNet) and language tasks. Our algorithm improves one-shot accuracy on ImageNet from 87.6% to 93.2% and from 88.0% to 93.8% on Omniglot compared to competing approaches. We also demonstrate the usefulness of the same model on language modeling by introducing a one-shot task on the Penn Treebank.
items.zh: 从少量示例中学习仍然是机器学习中的一个关键挑战。尽管在视觉和语言等重要领域取得了近期进展，标准的监督深度学习范式并未提供从少量数据中快速学习新概念的满意解决方案。在这项工作中，我们采用了基于深度神经特征的度量学习思想，以及近期通过外部记忆增强神经网络的进展。我们的框架学习一个网络，该网络将一个小型标注支持集和一个未标注示例映射到其标签，从而无需微调即可适应新的类别类型。然后，我们在视觉（使用Omniglot、ImageNet）和语言任务上定义了一次性学习问题。与竞争方法相比，我们的算法将ImageNet上的一次性学习准确率从87.6%提高到93.2%，在Omniglot上从88.0%提高到93.8%。我们还通过在Penn Treebank上引入一次性任务，展示了同一模型在语言建模中的实用性。

items.en: Humans learn new concepts with very little supervision – e.g. a child can generalize the concept of “giraffe” from a single picture in a book – yet our best deep learning systems need hundreds or thousands of examples. This motivates the setting we are interested in: “one-shot” learning, which consists of learning a class from a single labelled example.
items.zh: 人类在极少监督下学习新概念——例如，儿童可以从书中的一张图片中泛化出“长颈鹿”的概念——然而我们最好的深度学习系统需要数百或数千个示例。这激发了我们感兴趣的设置：“一次性”学习，即从单个标注示例中学习一个类别。

items.en: Deep learning has made major advances in areas such as speech [7], vision [13] and language [16], but is notorious for requiring large datasets. Data augmentation and regularization techniques alleviate overfitting in low data regimes, but do not solve it. Furthermore, learning is still slow and based on large datasets, requiring many weight updates using stochastic gradient descent. This, in our view, is mostly due to the parametric aspect of the model, in which training examples need to be slowly learnt by the model into its parameters.
items.zh: 深度学习在语音[7]、视觉[13]和语言[16]等领域取得了重大进展，但以需要大型数据集而闻名。数据增强和正则化技术可以缓解低数据情况下的过拟合，但并未解决根本问题。此外，学习仍然缓慢且基于大型数据集，需要大量使用随机梯度下降的权重更新。在我们看来，这主要是由于模型的参数化方面，训练示例需要被模型缓慢地学习到其参数中。

items.en: In contrast, many non-parametric models allow novel examples to be rapidly assimilated, whilst not suffering from catastrophic forgetting. Some models in this family (e.g., nearest neighbors) do not require any training but performance depends on the chosen metric [1]. Previous work on metric learning in non-parametric setups [18] has been influential on our model, and we aim to incorporate the best characteristics from both parametric and non-parametric models – namely, rapid acquisition of new examples while providing excellent generalisation from common examples.
items.zh: 相比之下，许多非参数模型允许快速吸收新示例，同时不会遭受灾难性遗忘。该家族中的一些模型（例如最近邻）不需要任何训练，但性能取决于所选度量[1]。先前在非参数设置中的度量学习工作[18]对我们的模型产生了影响，我们旨在结合参数化和非参数模型的最佳特性——即快速获取新示例，同时从常见示例中提供出色的泛化能力。

items.en: The novelty of our work is twofold: at the modeling level, and at the training procedure. We propose Matching Nets (MN), a neural network which uses recent advances in attention and memory that enable rapid learning. Secondly, our training procedure is based on a simple machine learning principle: test and train conditions must match. Thus to train our network to do rapid learning, we train it by showing only a few examples per class, switching the task from minibatch to minibatch, much like how it will be tested when presented with a few examples of a new task.
items.zh: 我们工作的新颖性体现在两个方面：模型层面和训练过程层面。我们提出了匹配网络（MN），这是一种利用注意力和记忆近期进展的神经网络，能够实现快速学习。其次，我们的训练过程基于一个简单的机器学习原则：测试和训练条件必须匹配。因此，为了训练我们的网络进行快速学习，我们通过每类仅展示少量示例来训练它，并在小批量之间切换任务，就像在测试时面对新任务的少量示例一样。

items.en: Besides our contributions in defining a model and training criterion amenable for one-shot learning, we contribute by the definition of tasks that can be used to benchmark other approaches on both ImageNet and small scale language modeling. We hope that our results will encourage others to work on this challenging problem.
items.zh: 除了在定义适用于一次性学习的模型和训练准则方面的贡献外，我们还通过定义可用于在ImageNet和小规模语言建模上基准测试其他方法的任务做出了贡献。我们希望我们的结果能鼓励其他人研究这个具有挑战性的问题。

items.en: We organized the paper by first defining and explaining our model whilst linking its several components to related work. Then in the following section we briefly elaborate on some of the related work to the task and our model. In Section 4 we describe both our general setup and the experiments we performed, demonstrating strong results on one-shot learning on a variety of tasks and setups.
items.zh: 我们首先定义并解释我们的模型，同时将其多个组成部分与相关工作联系起来。然后在下一节中，我们简要阐述与该任务和我们的模型相关的一些工作。在第4节中，我们描述了一般设置和进行的实验，展示了在多种任务和设置上一次性学习的强大结果。

items.en: Our non-parametric approach to solving one-shot learning is based on two components which we describe in the following subsections. First, our model architecture follows recent advances in neural networks augmented with memory (as discussed in Section 3). Given a (small) support set S𝑆S, our model defines a function cSsubscript𝑐𝑆c_{S} (or classifier) for each S𝑆S, i.e. a mapping S→cS(.)S\rightarrow c_{S}(.). Second, we employ a training strategy which is tailored for one-shot learning from the support set S𝑆S.
items.zh: 我们解决一次性学习的非参数方法基于两个组成部分，我们将在以下小节中描述。首先，我们的模型架构遵循近期通过记忆增强神经网络的进展（如第3节所述）。给定一个（小型）支持集S，我们的模型为每个S定义一个函数c_S（或分类器），即映射S→c_S(·)。其次，我们采用一种针对从支持集S进行一次性学习量身定制的训练策略。

items.en: In recent years, many groups have investigated ways to augment neural network architectures with external memories and other components that make them more “computer-like”. We draw inspiration from models such as sequence to sequence (seq2seq) with attention [2], memory networks [29] and pointer networks [27].
items.zh: 近年来，许多团队研究了通过外部记忆和其他组件增强神经网络架构的方法，使其更像“计算机”。我们从序列到序列（seq2seq）加注意力[2]、记忆网络[29]和指针网络[27]等模型中汲取灵感。

items.en: In all these models, a neural attention mechanism, often fully differentiable, is defined to access (or read) a memory matrix which stores useful information to solve the task at hand. Typical uses of this include machine translation, speech recognition, or question answering. More generally, these architectures model P​(B|A)𝑃conditional𝐵𝐴P(B|A) where A𝐴A and/or B𝐵B can be a sequence (like in seq2seq models), or, more interestingly for us, a set [26].
items.zh: 在所有这些模型中，定义了一个通常完全可微的神经注意力机制，用于访问（或读取）存储有用信息以解决当前任务的记忆矩阵。典型应用包括机器翻译、语音识别或问答。更一般地，这些架构对P(B|A)建模，其中A和/或B可以是序列（如seq2seq模型），或者对我们更有趣的是，一个集合[26]。

items.en: Our contribution is to cast the problem of one-shot learning within the set-to-set framework [26]. The key point is that when trained, Matching Networks are able to produce sensible test labels for unobserved classes without any changes to the network. More precisely, we wish to map from a (small) support set of k𝑘k examples of image-label pairs S={(xi,yi)}i=1k𝑆superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖𝑖1𝑘S=\{(x_{i},y_{i})\}_{i=1}^{k} to a classifier cS​(x^)subscript𝑐𝑆^𝑥c_{S}(\hat{x}) which, given a test example x^^𝑥\hat{x}, defines a probability distribution over outputs y^^𝑦\hat{y}. We define the mapping S→cS​(x^)→𝑆subscript𝑐𝑆^𝑥S\rightarrow c_{S}(\hat{x}) to be P​(y^|x^,S)𝑃conditional^𝑦^𝑥𝑆P(\hat{y}|\hat{x},S) where P𝑃P is parameterised by a neural network. Thus, when given a new support set of examples S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime} from which to one-shot learn, we simply use the parametric neural network defined by P𝑃P to make predictions about the appropriate label y^^𝑦\hat{y} for each test example x^^𝑥\hat{x}: P​(y^|x^,S′)𝑃conditional^𝑦^𝑥superscript𝑆′P(\hat{y}|\hat{x},S^{\prime}). In general, our predicted output class for a given input unseen example x^^𝑥\hat{x} and a support set S𝑆S becomes arg⁡maxy⁡P​(y|x^,S)subscript𝑦𝑃conditional𝑦^𝑥𝑆\arg\max_{y}P(y|\hat{x},S).
items.zh: 我们的贡献是将一次性学习问题置于集合到集合框架[26]中。关键在于，当训练完成后，匹配网络能够为未观察到的类别生成合理的测试标签，而无需对网络进行任何更改。更精确地说，我们希望将一个小型支持集S（包含k个图像-标签对）映射到一个分类器c_S(ˆx)，该分类器给定测试示例ˆx，定义输出ˆy上的概率分布。我们将映射S→c_S(ˆx)定义为P(ˆy|ˆx,S)，其中P由神经网络参数化。因此，当给定一个新的支持集S'进行一次性学习时，我们只需使用由P定义的参数化神经网络来预测每个测试示例ˆx的适当标签ˆy：P(ˆy|ˆx,S')。通常，对于给定的未见输入示例ˆx和支持集S，我们预测的输出类别变为arg max_y P(y|ˆx,S)。

items.en: Our model in its simplest form computes y^^𝑦\hat{y} as follows:
items.zh: 我们模型的最简单形式计算ˆy如下：

items.en: where xi,yisubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖x_{i},y_{i} are the samples and labels from the support set S={(xi,yi)}i=1k𝑆superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖𝑖1𝑘S=\{(x_{i},y_{i})\}_{i=1}^{k}, and a𝑎a is an attention mechanism which we discuss below. Note that eq. 1 essentially describes the output for a new class as a linear combination of the labels in the support set. Where the attention mechanism a𝑎a is a kernel on X×X𝑋𝑋X\times X, then (1) is akin to a kernel density estimator. Where the attention mechanism is zero for the b𝑏b furthest xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} from x^^𝑥\hat{x} according to some distance metric and an appropriate constant otherwise, then (1) is equivalent to ‘k−b𝑘𝑏k-b’-nearest neighbours (although this requires an extension to the attention mechanism that we describe in Section 2.1.2). Thus (1) subsumes both KDE and kNN methods. Another view of (1) is where a𝑎a acts as an attention mechanism and the yisubscript𝑦𝑖y_{i} act as memories bound to the corresponding xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}. In this case we can understand this as a particular kind of associative memory where, given an input, we “point” to the corresponding example in the support set, retrieving its label. However, unlike other attentional memory mechanisms [2], (1) is non-parametric in nature: as the support set size grows, so does the memory used. Hence the functional form defined by the classifier cS​(x^)subscript𝑐𝑆^𝑥c_{S}(\hat{x}) is very flexible and can adapt easily to any new support set.
items.zh: 其中x_i, y_i是来自支持集S={(x_i,y_i)}_{i=1}^k的样本和标签，a是我们下面讨论的注意力机制。注意，公式1本质上将新类别的输出描述为支持集中标签的线性组合。当注意力机制a是X×X上的核时，公式1类似于核密度估计。当注意力机制对于根据某个距离度量距离ˆx最远的b个x_i为零，而对于其他为适当常数时，公式1等价于'k-b'最近邻（尽管这需要对注意力机制进行扩展，我们在第2.1.2节中描述）。因此，公式1涵盖了KDE和kNN方法。公式1的另一种观点是，a充当注意力机制，y_i充当绑定到相应x_i的记忆。在这种情况下，我们可以将其理解为一种特殊的联想记忆，其中给定一个输入，我们“指向”支持集中的相应示例，检索其标签。然而，与其他注意力记忆机制[2]不同，公式1本质上是非参数化的：随着支持集大小的增长，使用的记忆也会增长。因此，由分类器c_S(ˆx)定义的函数形式非常灵活，可以轻松适应任何新的支持集。

items.en: Equation 1 relies on choosing a(.,.)a(.,.), the attention mechanism, which fully specifies the classifier. The simplest form that this takes (and which has very tight relationships with common attention models and kernel functions) is to use the softmax over the cosine distance c𝑐c, i.e., a​(x^,xi)=ec​(f​(x^),g​(xi))/∑j=1kec​(f​(x^),g​(xj))𝑎^𝑥subscript𝑥𝑖superscript𝑒𝑐𝑓^𝑥𝑔subscript𝑥𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑘superscript𝑒𝑐𝑓^𝑥𝑔subscript𝑥𝑗a(\hat{x},x_{i})=e^{c(f(\hat{x}),g(x_{i}))}/\sum_{j=1}^{k}e^{c(f(\hat{x}),g(x_{j}))} with embedding functions f𝑓f and g𝑔g being appropriate neural networks (potentially with f=g𝑓𝑔f=g) to embed x^^𝑥\hat{x} and xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}. In our experiments we shall see examples where f𝑓f and g𝑔g are parameterised variously as deep convolutional networks for image tasks (as in VGG[22] or Inception[24]) or a simple form word embedding for language tasks (see Section 4).
items.zh: 公式1依赖于选择a(·,·)，即注意力机制，它完全指定了分类器。最简单的形式（与常见注意力模型和核函数有非常紧密的关系）是使用余弦距离c上的softmax，即a(ˆx, x_i)=e^{c(f(ˆx), g(x_i))} / Σ_{j=1}^k e^{c(f(ˆx), g(x_j))}，其中嵌入函数f和g是适当的神经网络（可能f=g），用于嵌入ˆx和x_i。在我们的实验中，我们将看到f和g被参数化为深度卷积网络（用于图像任务，如VGG[22]或Inception[24]）或简单的词嵌入形式（用于语言任务，见第4节）。

items.en: We note that, though related to metric learning, the classifier defined by Equation 1 is discriminative. For a given support set S𝑆S and sample to classify x^^𝑥\hat{x}, it is enough for x^^𝑥\hat{x} to be sufficiently aligned with pairs (x′,y′)∈Ssuperscript𝑥′superscript𝑦′𝑆(x^{\prime},y^{\prime})\in S such that y′=ysuperscript𝑦′𝑦y^{\prime}=y and misaligned with the rest. This kind of loss is also related to methods such as Neighborhood Component Analysis (NCA) [18], triplet loss [9] or large margin nearest neighbor [28].
items.zh: 我们注意到，尽管与度量学习相关，但由公式1定义的分类器是判别式的。对于给定的支持集S和待分类样本ˆx，只要ˆx与S中满足y'=y的(x',y')对充分对齐，并与其余部分不对齐即可。这种损失也与邻域成分分析（NCA）[18]、三元组损失[9]或大间隔最近邻[28]等方法相关。

items.en: However, the objective that we are trying to optimize is precisely aligned with multi-way, one-shot classification, and thus we expect it to perform better than its counterparts. Additionally, the loss is simple and differentiable so that one can find the optimal parameters in an “end-to-end” fashion.
items.zh: 然而，我们试图优化的目标恰好与多路一次性分类对齐，因此我们期望它比对应方法表现更好。此外，该损失简单且可微，因此可以以“端到端”的方式找到最优参数。

items.en: The main novelty of our model lies in reinterpreting a well studied framework (neural networks with external memories) to do one-shot learning. Closely related to metric learning, the embedding functions f𝑓f and g𝑔g act as a lift to feature space X𝑋X to achieve maximum accuracy through the classification function described in eq. 1.
items.zh: 我们模型的主要新颖之处在于重新解释了一个经过充分研究的框架（具有外部记忆的神经网络）来进行一次性学习。与度量学习密切相关，嵌入函数f和g充当到特征空间X的提升，以通过公式1中描述的分类函数实现最大准确率。

items.en: Despite the fact that the classification strategy is fully conditioned on the whole support set through P(.|x^,S)P(.|\hat{x},S), the embeddings on which we apply the cosine similarity to “attend”, “point” or simply compute the nearest neighbor are myopic in the sense that each element xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} gets embedded by g​(xi)𝑔subscript𝑥𝑖g(x_{i}) independently of other elements in the support set S𝑆S. Furthermore, S𝑆S should be able to modify how we embed the test image x^^𝑥\hat{x} through f𝑓f.
items.zh: 尽管分类策略通过P(·|ˆx,S)完全依赖于整个支持集，但用于计算余弦相似度以“关注”、“指向”或简单计算最近邻的嵌入是短视的，因为每个元素x_i由g(x_i)独立嵌入，而不考虑支持集S中的其他元素。此外，S应该能够通过f修改我们嵌入测试图像ˆx的方式。

items.en: We propose embedding the elements of the set through a function which takes as input the full set S𝑆S in addition to xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}, i.e. g𝑔g becomes g​(xi,S)𝑔subscript𝑥𝑖𝑆g(x_{i},S). Thus, as a function of the whole support set S𝑆S, g𝑔g can modify how to embed xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}. This could be useful when some element xjsubscript𝑥𝑗x_{j} is very close to xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i}, in which case it may be beneficial to change the function with which we embed xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} – some evidence of this is discussed in Section 4. We use a bidirectional Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM) [8] to encode xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} in the context of the support set S𝑆S, considered as a sequence (see appendix for a more precise definition).
items.zh: 我们建议通过一个函数来嵌入集合中的元素，该函数除了x_i外还接受整个集合S作为输入，即g变为g(x_i, S)。因此，作为整个支持集S的函数，g可以修改如何嵌入x_i。当某个元素x_j非常接近x_i时，这可能很有用，此时改变嵌入x_i的函数可能是有益的——第4节中讨论了一些证据。我们使用双向长短期记忆网络（LSTM）[8]在支持集S的上下文中编码x_i，将S视为一个序列（更精确的定义见附录）。

items.en: The second issue can be fixed via an LSTM with read-attention over the whole set S𝑆S, whose inputs are equal to x𝑥x:
items.zh: 第二个问题可以通过一个带有对整个集合S的读取注意力的LSTM来解决，其输入等于x：

items.en: where f′​(x^)superscript𝑓′^𝑥f^{\prime}(\hat{x}) are the features (e.g., derived from a CNN) which are input to the LSTM (constant at each time step). K𝐾K is the fixed number of unrolling steps of the LSTM, and g​(S)𝑔𝑆g(S) is the set over which we attend, embedded with g𝑔g. This allows for the model to potentially ignore some elements in the support set S𝑆S, and adds “depth” to the computation of attention (see appendix for more details).
items.zh: 其中f'(x̂)是输入到LSTM的特征（例如，从CNN中提取的），在每个时间步长上保持不变。K是LSTM的固定展开步数，g(S)是我们关注的集合，通过g嵌入。这使得模型有可能忽略支持集S中的一些元素，并为注意力计算增加了“深度”（详见附录）。

items.en: In the previous subsection we described Matching Networks which map a support set to a classification function, S→c​(x^)→𝑆𝑐^𝑥S\rightarrow c(\hat{x}). We achieve this via a modification of the set-to-set paradigm augmented with attention, with the resulting mapping being of the form Pθ(.|x^,S)P_{\theta}(.|\hat{x},S), noting that θ𝜃\theta are the parameters of the model (i.e. of the embedding functions f𝑓f and g𝑔g described previously).
items.zh: 在前一小节中，我们描述了匹配网络，它将支持集映射到一个分类函数S→c(x̂)。我们通过修改集到集范式并增加注意力来实现这一点，得到的映射形式为Pθ(.|x̂,S)，其中θ是模型的参数（即前面描述的嵌入函数f和g）。

items.en: The training procedure has to be chosen carefully so as to match inference at test time. Our model has to perform well with support sets S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime} which contain classes never seen during training.
items.zh: 训练过程必须精心选择，以便与测试时的推理相匹配。我们的模型必须在包含训练中从未见过的类别的支持集S'上表现良好。

items.en: More specifically, let us define a task T𝑇T as distribution over possible label sets L𝐿L. Typically we consider T𝑇T to uniformly weight all data sets of up to a few unique classes (e.g., 5), with a few examples per class (e.g., up to 5). In this case, a label set L𝐿L sampled from a task T𝑇T, L∼Tsimilar-to𝐿𝑇L\sim T, will typically have 5 to 25 examples.
items.zh: 更具体地说，让我们定义一个任务T为可能标签集L上的分布。通常我们认为T均匀地加权所有包含最多几个独特类别（例如5个）且每个类别有少量样本（例如最多5个）的数据集。在这种情况下，从任务T中采样的标签集L，L∼T，通常会有5到25个样本。

items.en: To form an “episode” to compute gradients and update our model, we first sample L𝐿L from T𝑇T (e.g., L𝐿L could be the label set {c​a​t​s,d​o​g​s}𝑐𝑎𝑡𝑠𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠\{cats,dogs\}). We then use L𝐿L to sample the support set S𝑆S and a batch B𝐵B (i.e., both S𝑆S and B𝐵B are labelled examples of cats and dogs). The Matching Net is then trained to minimise the error predicting the labels in the batch B𝐵B conditioned on the support set S𝑆S. This is a form of meta-learning since the training procedure explicitly learns to learn from a given support set to minimise a loss over a batch. More precisely, the Matching Nets training objective is as follows:
items.zh: 为了形成一个“episode”来计算梯度并更新我们的模型，我们首先从T中采样L（例如，L可以是标签集{cats,dogs}）。然后我们使用L来采样支持集S和一个批次B（即S和B都是猫和狗的带标签样本）。然后训练匹配网络以最小化在给定支持集S的条件下预测批次B中标签的错误。这是一种元学习形式，因为训练过程明确地学习从给定的支持集中学习，以最小化批次上的损失。更准确地说，匹配网络的训练目标如下：

items.en: Training θ𝜃\theta with eq. 2 yields a model which works well when sampling S′∼T′similar-tosuperscript𝑆′superscript𝑇′S^{\prime}\sim T^{\prime} from a different distribution of novel labels. Crucially, our model does not need any fine tuning on the classes it has never seen due to its non-parametric nature. Obviously, as T′superscript𝑇′T^{\prime} diverges far from the T𝑇T from which we sampled to learn θ𝜃\theta, the model will not work – we belabor this point further in Section 4.1.2.
items.zh: 使用公式2训练θ产生一个模型，当从不同分布的新标签中采样S'∼T'时，该模型表现良好。关键的是，由于我们的模型是非参数的，它不需要对从未见过的类别进行任何微调。显然，当T'与用于学习θ的T相差甚远时，模型将无法工作——我们在第4.1.2节中进一步阐述这一点。

items.en: A recent surge of models which go beyond “static” classification of fixed vectors onto their classes has reshaped current research and industrial applications alike. This is most notable in the massive adoption of LSTMs [8] in a variety of tasks such as speech [7], translation [23, 2] or learning programs [4, 27]. A key component which allowed for more expressive models was the introduction of “content” based attention in [2], and “computer-like” architectures such as the Neural Turing Machine [4] or Memory Networks [29]. Our work takes the metalearning paradigm of [21], where an LSTM learnt to learn quickly from data presented sequentially, but we treat the data as a set. The one-shot learning task we defined on the Penn Treebank [15] relates to evaluation techniques and models presented in [6], and we discuss this in Section 4.
items.zh: 最近涌现的一批模型超越了将固定向量“静态”分类到其类别的做法，重塑了当前的研究和工业应用。最显著的是LSTM[8]在语音[7]、翻译[23,2]或学习程序[4,27]等各种任务中的大规模采用。一个允许更具表达力的模型的关键组件是[2]中引入的基于“内容”的注意力，以及类似“计算机”的架构，如神经图灵机[4]或记忆网络[29]。我们的工作采用了[21]的元学习范式，其中LSTM学习从顺序呈现的数据中快速学习，但我们将数据视为一个集合。我们在Penn Treebank[15]上定义的一次学习任务与[6]中提出的评估技术和模型相关，我们在第4节中讨论这一点。

items.en: As discussed in Section 2, there are many links between content based attention, kernel based nearest neighbor and metric learning [1]. The most relevant work is Neighborhood Component Analysis (NCA) [18], and the follow up non-linear version [20]. The loss is very similar to ours, except we use the whole support set S𝑆S instead of pair-wise comparisons which is more amenable to one-shot learning. Follow-up work in the form of deep convolutional siamese [11] networks included much more powerful non-linear mappings. Other losses which include the notion of a set (but use less powerful metrics) were proposed in [28].
items.zh: 如第2节所述，基于内容的注意力、基于核的最近邻和度量学习之间存在许多联系[1]。最相关的工作是邻域成分分析（NCA）[18]及其后续的非线性版本[20]。其损失与我们的非常相似，只是我们使用整个支持集S而不是成对比较，这更适用于一次学习。后续工作以深度卷积孪生网络[11]的形式包含了更强大的非线性映射。其他包含集合概念但使用较弱度量的损失在[28]中提出。

items.en: Lastly, the work in one-shot learning in [14] was inspirational and also provided us with the invaluable Omniglot dataset – referred to as the “transpose” of MNIST. Other works used zero-shot learning on ImageNet, e.g. [17]. However, there is not much one-shot literature on ImageNet, which we hope to amend via our benchmark and task definitions in the following section.
items.zh: 最后，[14]中关于一次学习的工作具有启发性，并为我们提供了宝贵的Omniglot数据集——被称为MNIST的“转置”。其他工作如[17]在ImageNet上使用了零次学习。然而，关于ImageNet的一次学习文献并不多，我们希望通过下一节中的基准和任务定义来弥补这一点。

items.en: In this section we describe the results of many experiments, comparing our Matching Networks model against strong baselines. All of our experiments revolve around the same basic task: an N𝑁N-way k𝑘k-shot learning task. Each method is providing with a set of k𝑘k labelled examples from each of N𝑁N classes that have not previously been trained upon. The task is then to classify a disjoint batch of unlabelled examples into one of these N𝑁N classes. Thus random performance on this task stands at 1/N1𝑁1/N. We compared a number of alternative models, as baselines, to Matching Networks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了许多实验的结果，将我们的匹配网络模型与强基线进行比较。我们所有的实验都围绕相同的基本任务：N-way k-shot学习任务。每种方法都提供来自N个之前未训练过的类别中每个类别的k个带标签样本。任务是将一个不相交的未标记样本批次分类到这些N个类别之一。因此，该任务的随机性能为1/N。我们将多种替代模型作为基线与匹配网络进行比较。

items.en: Let L′superscript𝐿′L^{\prime} denote the held-out subset of labels which we only use for one-shot. Unless otherwise specified, training is always on ≠L′absentsuperscript𝐿′\neq\!\!L^{\prime}, and test in one-shot mode on L′superscript𝐿′L^{\prime}.
items.zh: 令L'表示仅用于一次学习的保留标签子集。除非另有说明，训练总是在≠L'上进行，测试以一次学习模式在L'上进行。

items.en: We ran one-shot experiments on three data sets: two image classification sets (Omniglot [14] and ImageNet [19, ILSVRC-2012]) and one language modeling (Penn Treebank). The experiments on the three data sets comprise a diverse set of qualities in terms of complexity, sizes, and modalities.
items.zh: 我们在三个数据集上运行了一次学习实验：两个图像分类集（Omniglot [14]和ImageNet [19, ILSVRC-2012]）和一个语言建模（Penn Treebank）。这三个数据集上的实验在复杂性、大小和模态方面具有多样化的特性。

items.en: For vision problems, we considered four kinds of baselines: matching on raw pixels, matching on discriminative features from a state-of-the-art classifier (Baseline Classifier), MANN [21], and our reimplementation of the Convolutional Siamese Net [11]. The baseline classifier was trained to classify an image into one of the original classes present in the training data set, but excluding the N𝑁N classes so as not to give it an unfair advantage (i.e., trained to classify classes in ≠L′absentsuperscript𝐿′\neq\!\!L^{\prime}). We then took this network and used the features from the last layer (before the softmax) for nearest neighbour matching, a strategy commonly used in computer vision [3] which has achieved excellent results across many tasks. Following [11], the convolutional siamese nets were trained on a same-or-different task of the original training data set and then the last layer was used for nearest neighbour matching.
items.zh: 对于视觉问题，我们考虑了四种基线：原始像素匹配、来自最先进分类器的判别特征匹配（基线分类器）、MANN [21]以及我们重新实现的卷积孪生网络[11]。基线分类器被训练为将图像分类为训练数据集中存在的原始类别之一，但排除N个类别以免给予不公平的优势（即，训练分类≠L'中的类别）。然后我们使用该网络最后一层（softmax之前）的特征进行最近邻匹配，这是计算机视觉中常用的策略[3]，已在许多任务上取得了优异的结果。遵循[11]，卷积孪生网络在原始训练数据集的相同-不同任务上进行训练，然后使用最后一层进行最近邻匹配。

items.en: We also tried further fine tuning the features using only the support set S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime} sampled from L′superscript𝐿′L^{\prime}. This yields massive overfitting, but given that our networks are highly regularized, can yield extra gains. Note that, even when fine tuning, the setup is still one-shot, as only a single example per class from L′superscript𝐿′L^{\prime} is used.
items.zh: 我们还尝试仅使用从L'采样的支持集S'进一步微调特征。这会导致严重的过拟合，但鉴于我们的网络高度正则化，可以带来额外的收益。请注意，即使在微调时，设置仍然是一次学习，因为每个类别只使用来自L'的一个样本。

items.en: Omniglot [14] consists of 1623 characters from 50 different alphabets. Each of these was hand drawn by 20 different people. The large number of classes (characters) with relatively few data per class (20), makes this an ideal data set for testing small-scale one-shot classification. The N𝑁N-way Omniglot task setup is as follows: pick N𝑁N unseen character classes, independent of alphabet, as L𝐿L. Provide the model with one drawing of each of the N𝑁N characters as S∼Lsimilar-to𝑆𝐿S\sim L and a batch B∼Lsimilar-to𝐵𝐿B\sim L. Following [21], we augmented the data set with random rotations by multiples of 90 degrees and used 1200 characters for training, and the remaining character classes for evaluation.
items.zh: Omniglot [14]包含来自50种不同字母表的1623个字符。每个字符由20个不同的人手绘。大量的类别（字符）且每个类别的数据相对较少（20个），使其成为测试小规模一次分类的理想数据集。N-way Omniglot任务设置如下：选择N个未见过的字符类别，独立于字母表，作为L。向模型提供每个N个字符的一个绘图作为S∼L，以及一个批次B∼L。遵循[21]，我们通过随机旋转90度的倍数来增强数据集，并使用1200个字符进行训练，其余字符类别用于评估。

items.en: We used a simple yet powerful CNN as the embedding function – consisting of a stack of modules, each of which is a 3×3333\times 3 convolution with 64 filters followed by batch normalization [10], a Relu non-linearity and 2×2222\times 2 max-pooling. We resized all the images to 28×28282828\times 28 so that, when we stack 4 modules, the resulting feature map is 1×1×6411641\times 1\times 64, resulting in our embedding function f​(x)𝑓𝑥f(x). A fully connected layer followed by a softmax non-linearity is used to define the Baseline Classifier.
items.zh: 我们使用了一个简单但强大的CNN作为嵌入函数——由一系列模块组成，每个模块是一个3×3卷积，64个滤波器，后接批归一化[10]、ReLU非线性和2×2最大池化。我们将所有图像调整为28×28，这样当我们堆叠4个模块时，得到的特征图为1×1×64，从而得到我们的嵌入函数f(x)。一个全连接层后接softmax非线性用于定义基线分类器。

items.en: Results comparing the baselines to our model on Omniglot are shown in Table 1. For both 111-shot and 555-shot, 555-way and 202020-way, our model outperforms the baselines. There are no major surprises in these results: using more examples for k-shot classification helps all models, and 5-way is easier than 20-way. We note that the Baseline Classifier improves a bit when fine tuning on S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime}, and using cosine distance versus training a small softmax from the small training set (thus requiring fine tuning) also performs well. Siamese nets fare well versus our Matching Nets when using 5 examples per class, but their performance degrades rapidly in one-shot. Fully Conditional Embeddings (FCE) did not seem to help much and were left out of the table due to space constraints.
items.zh: 将基线与我们的模型在Omniglot上的结果进行比较，如表1所示。对于1-shot和5-shot、5-way和20-way，我们的模型均优于基线。这些结果中没有重大意外：使用更多样本进行k-shot分类对所有模型都有帮助，5-way比20-way更容易。我们注意到，基线分类器在S'上微调时略有改进，使用余弦距离与从小训练集训练一个小型softmax（因此需要微调）相比也表现良好。孪生网络在使用每个类别5个样本时与我们的匹配网络相比表现不错，但其性能在一次学习时迅速下降。全条件嵌入（FCE）似乎没有太大帮助，由于空间限制，表中未包含。

items.en: Like the authors in [11], we also test our method trained on Omniglot on a completely disjoint task – one-shot, 10 way MNIST classification. The Baseline Classifier does about 63% accuracy whereas (as reported in their paper) the Siamese Nets do 70%. Our model achieves 72%.
items.zh: 与[11]的作者类似，我们也在一个完全不同的任务上测试了在Omniglot上训练的方法——一次学习、10-way MNIST分类。基线分类器达到约63%的准确率，而（如他们论文中所述）孪生网络达到70%。我们的模型达到72%。

items.en: Our experiments followed the same setup as Omniglot for testing, but we considered a rand and a dogs (harder) setup. In the rand setup, we removed 118 labels at random from the training set, then tested only on these 118 classes (which we denote as Lr​a​n​dsubscript𝐿𝑟𝑎𝑛𝑑L_{rand}). For the dogs setup, we removed all classes in ImageNet descended from dogs (totalling 118) and trained on all non-dog classes, then tested on dog classes (Ld​o​g​ssubscript𝐿𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠L_{dogs}). ImageNet is a notoriously large data set which can be quite a feat of engineering and infrastructure to run experiments upon it, requiring many resources. Thus, as well as using the full ImageNet data set, we devised a new data set – miniImageNet – consisting of 60,0006000060,000 colour images of size 84×84848484\times 84 with 100100100 classes, each having 600600600 examples. This dataset is more complex than CIFAR10 [12], but fits in memory on modern machines, making it very convenient for rapid prototyping and experimentation. This dataset is fully described in Appendix B. We used 808080 classes for training and tested on the remaining 202020 classes. In total, thus, we have randImageNet, dogsImageNet, and miniImageNet.
items.zh: 我们的实验遵循与Omniglot相同的测试设置，但我们考虑了随机和狗（更难）两种设置。在随机设置中，我们从训练集中随机移除118个标签，然后仅在这些118个类别上进行测试（我们将其记为L_rand）。对于狗设置，我们移除了ImageNet中所有源自狗的类别（共118个），并在所有非狗类别上训练，然后在狗类别（L_dogs）上测试。ImageNet是一个众所周知的大型数据集，在其上运行实验可能需要大量的工程和基础设施，需要许多资源。因此，除了使用完整的ImageNet数据集外，我们设计了一个新的数据集——miniImageNet——包含60,000张84×84的彩色图像，有100个类别，每个类别有600个样本。该数据集比CIFAR10 [12]更复杂，但适合现代机器的内存，使其非常适合快速原型设计和实验。该数据集在附录B中完整描述。我们使用80个类别进行训练，并在剩余的20个类别上进行测试。因此，我们总共有randImageNet、dogsImageNet和miniImageNet。

items.en: The results of the miniImageNet experiments are shown in Table 2. As with Omniglot, Matching Networks outperform the baselines. However, miniImageNet is a much harder task than Omniglot which allowed us to evaluate Full Contextual Embeddings (FCE) sensibly (on Omniglot it made no difference). As we an see, FCE improves the performance of Matching Networks, with and without fine tuning, typically improving performance by around two percentage points.
items.zh: miniImageNet实验的结果如表2所示。与Omniglot一样，Matching Networks优于基线。然而，miniImageNet比Omniglot困难得多，这使我们能够合理地评估全上下文嵌入（FCE）（在Omniglot上它没有区别）。正如我们所看到的，FCE提高了Matching Networks的性能，无论是否进行微调，通常将性能提高约两个百分点。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Example of two 5-way problem instance on ImageNet. The images in the set S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime} contain classes never seen during training. Our model makes far less mistakes than the Inception baseline.
items.capZh: 图2：ImageNet上两个5-way问题实例的示例。集合S′中的图像包含训练期间从未见过的类别。我们的模型比Inception基线犯的错误少得多。

items.en: Next we turned to experiments based upon full size, full scale ImageNet. Our baseline classifier for this data set was Inception [25] trained to classify on all classes except those in the test set of classes (for randImageNet) or those concerning dogs (for dogsImageNet). We also compared to features from an Inception Oracle classifier trained on all classes in ImageNet, as an upper bound. Our Baseline Classifier is one of the strongest published ImageNet models at 79% top-1 accuracy on the standard ImageNet validation set. Instead of training Matching Networks from scratch on these large tasks, we initialised their feature extractors f𝑓f and g𝑔g with the parameters from the Inception classifier (pretrained on the appropriate subset of the data) and then further trained the resulting network on random 555-way 111-shot tasks from the training data set, incorporating Full Context Embeddings and our Matching Networks and training strategy.
items.zh: 接下来，我们转向基于全尺寸、全规模ImageNet的实验。我们对该数据集的基线分类器是Inception [25]，它被训练为对所有类别进行分类，但测试类别集（对于randImageNet）或与狗相关的类别（对于dogsImageNet）除外。我们还与在ImageNet所有类别上训练的Inception Oracle分类器的特征进行了比较，作为上限。我们的基线分类器是已发布的最强ImageNet模型之一，在标准ImageNet验证集上达到79%的top-1准确率。我们没有在这些大型任务上从头训练Matching Networks，而是用Inception分类器的参数（在数据的适当子集上预训练）初始化其特征提取器f和g，然后在训练数据集的随机5-way 1-shot任务上进一步训练生成的网络，结合全上下文嵌入以及我们的Matching Networks和训练策略。

items.en: The results of the randImageNet and dogsImageNet experiments are shown in Table 3. The Inception Oracle (trained on all classes) performs almost perfectly when restricted to 5 classes only, which is not too surprising given its impressive top-1 accuracy. When trained solely on ≠Lr​a​n​dabsentsubscript𝐿𝑟𝑎𝑛𝑑\neq\!\!L_{rand}, Matching Nets improve upon Inception by almost 6%percent66\% when tested on Lr​a​n​dsubscript𝐿𝑟𝑎𝑛𝑑L_{rand}, halving the errors. Figure 2 shows two instances of 5-way one-shot learning, where Inception fails. Looking at all the errors, Inception appears to sometimes prefer an image above all others (these images tend to be cluttered like the example in the second column, or more constant in color). Matching Nets, on the other hand, manage to recover from these outliers that sometimes appear in the support set S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime}.
items.zh: randImageNet和dogsImageNet实验的结果如表3所示。Inception Oracle（在所有类别上训练）在仅限制为5个类别时表现几乎完美，考虑到其令人印象深刻的top-1准确率，这并不太令人惊讶。当仅在≠L_rand上训练时，Matching Nets在L_rand上测试时比Inception提高了近6%，将错误减半。图2显示了两个5-way单样本学习的实例，其中Inception失败。查看所有错误，Inception似乎有时偏爱某一张图像（这些图像往往像第二列中的示例一样杂乱，或颜色更恒定）。另一方面，Matching Nets能够从支持集S′中偶尔出现的这些异常值中恢复。

items.en: Matching Nets manage to improve upon Inception on the complementary subset ≠Ld​o​g​sabsentsubscript𝐿𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠\neq\!\!L_{dogs} (although this setup is not one-shot, as the feature extraction has been trained on these labels). However, on the much more challenging Ld​o​g​ssubscript𝐿𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠L_{dogs} subset, our model degrades by 1%percent11\%. We hypothesize this to the fact that the sampled set during training, S𝑆S, comes from a random distribution of labels (from ≠Ld​o​g​sabsentsubscript𝐿𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠\neq\!\!L_{dogs}), whereas the testing support set S′superscript𝑆′S^{\prime} from Ld​o​g​ssubscript𝐿𝑑𝑜𝑔𝑠L_{dogs} contains similar classes, more akin to fine grained classification. Thus, we believe that if we adapted our training strategy to samples S𝑆S from fine grained sets of labels instead of sampling uniformly from the leafs of the ImageNet class tree, improvements could be attained. We leave this as future work.
items.zh: Matching Nets在互补子集≠L_dogs上比Inception有所改进（尽管这种设置不是单样本，因为特征提取已在这些标签上训练）。然而，在更具挑战性的L_dogs子集上，我们的模型下降了1%。我们假设这是因为训练期间采样的集合S来自标签的随机分布（来自≠L_dogs），而来自L_dogs的测试支持集S′包含相似的类别，更类似于细粒度分类。因此，我们相信，如果我们将训练策略调整为从细粒度标签集采样S，而不是从ImageNet类别树的叶子均匀采样，则可以实现改进。我们将此留作未来工作。

items.en: We also introduce a new one-shot language task which is analogous to those examined for images. The task is as follows: given a query sentence with a missing word in it, and a support set of sentences which each have a missing word and a corresponding 1-hot label, choose the label from the support set that best matches the query sentence. Here we show a single example, though note that the words on the right are not provided and the labels for the set are given as 1-hot-of-5 vectors.
items.zh: 我们还引入了一个新的单样本语言任务，类似于图像任务。任务如下：给定一个缺少单词的查询句子，以及一个支持集，其中每个句子都有一个缺失单词和一个对应的1-hot标签，从支持集中选择与查询句子最匹配的标签。这里我们展示一个示例，但请注意，右侧的单词未提供，集合的标签以5维1-hot向量形式给出。

items.en: Sentences were taken from the Penn Treebank dataset [15]. On each trial, we make sure that the set and batch are populated with sentences that are non-overlapping. This means that we do not use words with very low frequency counts; e.g. if there is only a single sentence for a given word we do not use this data since the sentence would need to be in both the set and the batch. As with the image tasks, each trial consisted of a 5 way choice between the classes available in the set. We used a batch size of 20 throughout the sentence matching task and varied the set size across k=1,2,3. We ensured that the same number of sentences were available for each class in the set. We split the words into a randomly sampled 9000 for training and 1000 for testing, and we used the standard test set to report results. Thus, neither the words nor the sentences used during test time had been seen during training.
items.zh: 句子取自Penn Treebank数据集[15]。在每次试验中，我们确保集合和批次中的句子不重叠。这意味着我们不使用频率非常低的单词；例如，如果某个单词只有一个句子，我们就不使用该数据，因为该句子需要同时出现在集合和批次中。与图像任务一样，每次试验在集合中可用的类别之间进行5-way选择。我们在整个句子匹配任务中使用批次大小为20，并在k=1,2,3之间变化集合大小。我们确保集合中每个类别的句子数量相同。我们将单词随机分为9000个用于训练和1000个用于测试，并使用标准测试集报告结果。因此，测试期间使用的单词和句子在训练期间都未见过。

items.en: We compared our one-shot matching model to an oracle LSTM language model (LSTM-LM) [30] trained on all the words. In this setup, the LSTM has an unfair advantage as it is not doing one-shot learning but seeing all the data – thus, this should be taken as an upper bound. To do so, we examined a similar setup wherein a sentence was presented to the model with a single word filled in with 5 different possible words (including the correct answer). For each of these 5 sentences the model gave a log-likelihood and the max of these was taken to be the choice of the model.
items.zh: 我们将我们的单样本匹配模型与在所有单词上训练的Oracle LSTM语言模型（LSTM-LM）[30]进行了比较。在这种设置中，LSTM具有不公平的优势，因为它不是进行单样本学习，而是看到所有数据——因此，这应被视为上限。为此，我们检查了类似的设置，其中向模型呈现一个句子，其中单个单词被5个不同的可能单词（包括正确答案）填充。对于这5个句子中的每一个，模型给出一个对数似然，取最大值作为模型的选择。

items.en: As with the other 5 way choice tasks, chance performance on this task was 20%. The LSTM language model oracle achieved an upper bound of 72.8% accuracy on the test set. Matching Networks with a simple encoding model achieve 32.4%, 36.1%, 38.2% accuracy on the task with k=1,2,3𝑘123k=1,2,3 examples in the set, respectively. Future work should explore combining parametric models such as an LSTM-LM with non-parametric components such as the Matching Networks explored here.
items.zh: 与其他5-way选择任务一样，该任务的随机性能为20%。LSTM语言模型Oracle在测试集上达到了72.8%准确率的上限。使用简单编码模型的Matching Networks在集合中k=1,2,3个示例的情况下，分别达到32.4%、36.1%、38.2%的准确率。未来的工作应探索将参数模型（如LSTM-LM）与非参数组件（如本文探索的Matching Networks）相结合。

items.en: Two related tasks are the CNN QA test of entity prediction from news articles [5], and the Children’s Book Test (CBT) [6]. In the CBT for example, a sequence of sentences from a book are provided as context. In the final sentence one of the words, which has appeared in a previous sentence, is missing. The task is to choose the correct word to fill in this blank from a small set of words given as possible answers, all of which occur in the preceding sentences. In our sentence matching task the sentences provided in the set are randomly drawn from the PTB corpus and are related to the sentences in the query batch only by the fact that they share a word. In contrast to CBT and CNN dataset, they provide only a generic rather than specific sequential context.
items.zh: 两个相关任务是来自新闻文章的实体预测的CNN QA测试[5]和儿童读物测试（CBT）[6]。例如，在CBT中，提供来自一本书的一系列句子作为上下文。在最后一个句子中，一个出现在前一个句子中的单词缺失。任务是从作为可能答案给出的一小组单词中选择正确的单词来填充这个空白，所有这些单词都出现在前面的句子中。在我们的句子匹配任务中，集合中提供的句子是从PTB语料库中随机抽取的，并且仅通过共享一个单词与查询批次中的句子相关。与CBT和CNN数据集相比，它们只提供通用的而非特定的顺序上下文。

items.en: In this paper we introduced Matching Networks, a new neural architecture that, by way of its corresponding training regime, is capable of state-of-the-art performance on a variety of one-shot classification tasks. There are a few key insights in this work. Firstly, one-shot learning is much easier if you train the network to do one-shot learning. Secondly, non-parametric structures in a neural network make it easier for networks to remember and adapt to new training sets in the same tasks. Combining these observations together yields Matching Networks. Further, we have defined new one-shot tasks on ImageNet, a reduced version of ImageNet (for rapid experimentation), and a language modeling task. An obvious drawback of our model is the fact that, as the support set S𝑆S grows in size, the computation for each gradient update becomes more expensive. Although there are sparse and sampling-based methods to alleviate this, much of our future efforts will concentrate around this limitation. Further, as exemplified in the ImageNet dogs subtask, when the label distribution has obvious biases (such as being fine grained), our model suffers. We feel this is an area with exciting challenges which we hope to keep improving in future work.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了Matching Networks，这是一种新的神经架构，通过其相应的训练机制，能够在各种单样本分类任务上实现最先进的性能。这项工作中存在几个关键见解。首先，如果你训练网络进行单样本学习，单样本学习会容易得多。其次，神经网络中的非参数结构使网络更容易在相同任务中记忆和适应新的训练集。将这些观察结合起来产生了Matching Networks。此外，我们在ImageNet、ImageNet的简化版本（用于快速实验）以及语言建模任务上定义了新的单样本任务。我们模型的一个明显缺点是，随着支持集S的大小增长，每次梯度更新的计算变得更加昂贵。尽管存在稀疏和基于采样的方法可以缓解这一问题，但我们未来的大部分工作将集中在这个限制上。此外，正如ImageNet狗子任务所示，当标签分布存在明显偏差（例如细粒度）时，我们的模型会受到影响。我们认为这是一个充满挑战的领域，希望在未来的工作中不断改进。

items.en: We would like to thank Nal Kalchbrenner for brainstorming around the design of the function g𝑔g, and Sander Dieleman and Sergio Guadarrama for their help setting up ImageNet. We would also like thank Simon Osindero for useful discussions around the tasks discussed in this paper, and Theophane Weber and Remi Munos for following some early developments. Karen Simonyan and David Silver helped with the manuscript, as well as many at Google DeepMind. Thanks also to Geoff Hinton and Alex Toshev for discussions about our results.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Nal Kalchbrenner在函数g的设计上的头脑风暴，以及Sander Dieleman和Sergio Guadarrama在设置ImageNet方面的帮助。我们还要感谢Simon Osindero就本文讨论的任务进行的有用讨论，以及Theophane Weber和Remi Munos对早期进展的关注。Karen Simonyan和David Silver帮助了手稿的撰写，以及Google DeepMind的许多人。还要感谢Geoff Hinton和Alex Toshev对我们结果的讨论。
